overall.description: A static first-person view of a street food vendor at a cyberpunk night market stall. The vendor wears a traditional conical hat and stands behind a steaming grill with skewers of meat, while a digital screen broadcasts animated content in the background. Atmospheric fog and neon purple-blue lighting create a futuristic Asian city ambiance typical of game engine footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: night market food stall with digital menu display

events.description: background digital screen cycles through different broadcast content showing various colorful graphics

agents.ego_description: standing stationary facing the food vendor, observing the grilling station and available items

notable_agents.action: vendor stands still with hands on hips behind the counter, wearing a conical hat and white sleeveless top

entered.detail: metal cooking surface with rows of meat skewers emitting steam and smoke
hanging rectangular display showing animated broadcast content with purple and yellow neon graphics
black rectangular tray containing uncooked meat portions
stack of folded white paper boxes and napkins
metal tongs and spatulas resting on the grill surface next to the skewers

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary facing a night market food vendor who stands behind a steaming grill station. The vendor, wearing a traditional conical hat, maintains a static pose with hands on hips while smoke rises from the cooking skewers. A digital screen mounted to the right cycles through broadcast content, casting shifting colored light across the scene. Various food preparation items including a raw meat tray and paper containers are arranged on the metal counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze on a cyberpunk street food stall where shifting digital lights dance across a static scene. It begins with a focused view of a vendor in a traditional conical hat standing motionless behind a steaming grill. As smoke rises steadily from the cooking skewers, the camera captures the arrangement of raw meat trays and paper containers lining the metal counter. The scene is then continuously transformed by a mounted digital screen to the right, which cycles through broadcast content to cast evolving pulses of colored light across the vendor and the surrounding night market ambiance.
